channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 Trooped/QuickBars (223 ⭐)

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

item.title: 📝 hxreborn/gh-fast-pass (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: hxreborn

📝 Repository: hxreborn/gh-fast-pass

📄 Descrizione: Xposed module for GitHub Mobile that closes the verification screen once the request is approved. Works for 2FA sign-ins, sudo confirmations, and device verification prompts.

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin
